name: GitHub Repo Scanner
description: Scans GitHub organization repositories for PRs and commits, ingests findings to ALDECI

parameters.jsCode:
return {
  items: $input.all().map((item, index) => ({
    repository_name: item.json.name,
    full_name: item.json.full_name,
    owner: item.json.owner?.login,
    url: item.json.html_url,
    language: item.json.language,
    stars: item.json.stargazers_count,
    watchers: item.json.watchers_count,
    forks: item.json.forks_count,
    open_issues: item.json.open_issues_count,
    created_at: item.json.created_at,
    updated_at: item.json.updated_at,
    pushed_at: item.json.pushed_at,
    size_kb: item.json.size,
    is_private: item.json.private,
    is_fork: item.json.fork,
    topics: item.json.topics || [],
    description: item.json.description,
    homepage: item.json.homepage,
    license: item.json.license?.name,
    last_activity_days_ago: Math.floor((new Date() - new Date(item.json.pushed_at)) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24))
  }))
};
